name: DailyBriefing
description: The single 'today' record that drives the Dashboard briefing console: readiness dial (score/label/delta), the coordinates strip (elevation/wind/window), the serif verdict headline and status line, the suggested-workout CTA, and the coach transmission (message/directive/signature). The dashboard reads the most-recent briefing; most fields are nullable so the empty and partial-data states render gracefully.

name: Vital
description: One overnight telemetry row shown in the Vitals section (HRV, Resting HR, Sleep, Steps, and future metrics). Flat and standalone so the partial-data scenario simply seeds fewer rows. Carries a display order, a formatted value + optional unit, an optional trend chip, a 0-100 track fill percentage, and a 'positive' flag that colors the track mint (good) versus signal-blue.

name: Workout
description: Yesterday's logged activity rendered in the Field Log section: title, photo caption, documentary photo URL (forced grayscale in the UI), and distance/pace/vertical stats. Zero rows in the no-workout-yesterday scenario, which triggers that section's own empty state.
